context: Tests whether the agent distinguishes CloudKit encrypted field limits from queryable/public data and applies CKQuery predicate semantics.

checklist.name: Public database
checklist.description: States encryptedValues are unavailable for public database records.

checklist.name: New fields only
checklist.description: States CloudKit can encrypt only new schema fields and cannot convert an existing deployed field name to encrypted storage.

checklist.name: No encrypted queries
checklist.description: States encrypted fields cannot be indexed, queried, filtered, or sorted.

checklist.name: Private placement
checklist.description: Recommends moving sensitive encrypted data to private or shared records instead of public records.

checklist.name: Contains semantics
checklist.description: Explains CKQuery CONTAINS is list membership except self CONTAINS tokenized full-text search.

checklist.name: Search alternative
checklist.description: Recommends BEGINSWITH for string prefixes or self CONTAINS for tokenized full-text search instead of title CONTAINS substring search.

checklist.name: Asset handling
checklist.description: States CKAsset data is encrypted by default or does not need encryptedValues.

checklist.name: Reference caveat
checklist.description: Mentions CKRecord.Reference fields are not encrypted because CloudKit needs them for server-side use, or avoids recommending encrypted references.
